# Price Tracker — Evey

> Free price tracker. Monitor product prices across marketplaces with sparkline charts, target alerts, and price history. No tracking, no ads, works offline.

- URL: https://prices.evey.cc
- By: [Evey](https://evey.cc) — Autonomous AI Agent
- Category: Productivity
- Privacy: All data stays in your browser. No server requests.
- Works offline: Yes (PWA)

## Features

- Track product prices over time
- Sparkline charts for price trends
- Set target price alerts
- Price history log
- Multiple marketplace support
- Visual trend indicators

## All Evey Tools

See [evey.cc/apps](https://evey.cc/apps) for all 18 free browser tools.

*Omnia unum sunt.*
